nasb.text: Yet there is both straw and fodder for our donkeys, and also bread and wine for me, your maidservant, and the young man who is with your servants; there is no lack of anything.”

esv.text: We have straw and feed for our donkeys, with bread and wine for me and your female servant and the young man with your servants. There is no lack of anything.”

cnv.text: 其實我有糧草、有飼料，可以餵驢；我和我的妾，以及與你的僕人在一起的那個青年人，都有餅和酒吃喝，一無所缺。”

ccb.text: 其实我有粮草喂驴，我和我的妾及仆人也有饼和酒，什么也不缺。”
